title: Assistant Store Manager - Health & Glow Global Group - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Health & Glow Global Group - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Health & Glow Global Group! We are hiring a Assistant Store Manager for our Tiruchirappalli team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Health & Glow Global Group:
Health & Glow Global Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Health & Glow Global Group!
